articles.title: Uttar Pradesh weather update: Lucknow to get rain, thunderstorms today; orange alert for tomorrow. IMD iss - economictimes.com
articles.search_term: ("heat advisory" OR "heat action plan" OR "heat alert" OR "IMD warning" OR "IMD alert" OR "red alert" OR "orange alert" OR "yellow alert" OR "NDMA advisory" OR "cooling shelter" OR "relief measures" OR "heat compensation" OR "severe weather warning") Uttar Pradesh
articles.full_text:
The India Meteorological Department has predicted rainfall, thunderstorms, hail storms, and gusty winds for several districts of Uttar Pradesh for the next few days. According to the IMD weather bulletin, rain and thundershowers are expected at a few places in western Uttar Pradesh. Thunderstorms with lightning and gusty winds (40–50 kmph, gusting up to 60 kmph) may occur at some locations, the IMD said, adding that hailstorm is also likely at isolated places.

In eastern Uttar Pradesh, rain and thundershowers are likely at many places, indicating wider coverage compared to western parts. "Thunderstorms with lightning and strong winds (40–50 kmph, gusting up to 60 kmph) are expected at a few places. There is also a chance of hailstorm at isolated locations," the IMD said in its latest weather bulletin.

UP weather: These districts to receive rain
Although the day began with partly cloudy skies over Lucknow, weather conditions are expected to shift as the evening progresses, with the India Meteorological Department (IMD) forecasting a thunderstorm accompanied by breezy winds later today.
The IMD has warned of moderate to heavy rain in Agra, Mathura, Saharanpur, Hapur, Muzaffarnagar, Jyotiba Phule Nagar, Bareilly, Sambhal, Bulandshahr, Shahjahanpur, Pilibhit, Moradabad, Pilibhit, Sitapur, Barabanki, Lucknow, Kannauj, Fatehpur, Kanpur, Pratapgarh, Banda, and Lucknow.
Lucknow weather
For April 7, the weather office has predicted partly cloudy skies in Lucknow with possibility of light rain towards evening or night. A yellow alert has been issued for Lucknow today, warning of thunderstorms accompanied with lightning.
An orange alert has been sounded for Lucknow for Wednesday, April 8, 2026. The IMD has forecast intermittent spells of rain thunderstorms accompanied with gusty winds and possibility of hailstorm. "Thunderstorm accompanied with Hailstorm, Thunderstorm accompanied with lightning & gusty winds(40-50kmph)," the IMD forecast for Lucknow read.
The department further stated that fluctuating weather conditions will continue across many districts, including Lucknow, between April 8 and April 11. The region is likely to see a mix of sunny and cloudy skies, along with spells of rain, hail, and strong winds.

articles.full_text:
IMD warns Uttar Pradesh of storms, orange alert for Lucknow
Heads up, Uttar Pradesh, IMD says the weather's about to get interesting.
Lucknow is on yellow alert today (April 7) with evening thunderstorms and light rain possible.
Tomorrow, things ramp up with an orange alert for Lucknow on April 8, and 20 districts (think Agra and Saharanpur) are expected to receive moderate to heavy rain, warning of heavy rainfall, lightning, strong winds, and even hailstorms.
These unsettled conditions could stick around for a few days.
Rain, 60 kph winds in UP
Specific districts can expect moderate to heavy rain, gusty winds (up to 60 kph), and occasional hail.
Eastern districts aren't off the hook either: widespread showers and thunderstorms are likely there too.
If you're in Lucknow or in cities like Kanpur or Barabanki, keep an umbrella handy until April 11 as on-and-off storms roll through.
Stay safe and plan accordingly.
